zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Freeman於1505年出生在英國哈普爾時，他的父親Lawrence Freeman20歲，母親Anne Matilda Freebody18歲。他於1534年與Mary Wintershall在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年4月29日在英國享年53歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Freeman于1505年出生在英国哈普爾时，他的父亲Lawrence Freeman20岁，母亲Anne Matilda Freebody18岁。他于1534年与Mary Wintershall在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年4月29日在英国享年53岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Freeman was born in 1505, in Hampshire, England, his father, Lawrence Freeman, was 20 and his mother, Anne Matilda Freebody, was 18. He married Mary Wintershall in 1534, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 April 1558, in England, at the age of 53, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Freeman est né en 1505, à Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence Freeman, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Matilda Freebody, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mary Wintershall en 1534, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1558, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Freeman 1505 in Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence Freeman 20 und seine Mutter Anne Matilda Freebody 18. Er hat 1534 in England Mary Wintershall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1558 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Freeman è nato il nel 1505 nel Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Lawrence Freeman, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Anne Matilda Freebody, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mary Wintershall nel 1534, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1558, nel England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Freemanが1505年にイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lawrence Freemanは20歳，母Anne Matilda Freebodyは18歳であった。1534年にイギリスでMary Wintershallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年4月29日にイギリスで53歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Freeman(이)가 1505년 영국 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Freeman(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Matilda Freebody(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1534년 영국에서 Mary Wintershall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 4월 29일 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Freeman nasceu em 1505, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lawrence Freeman, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anne Matilda Freebody, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Wintershall em 1534, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1558, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Freeman родился в 1505 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lawrence Freeman было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Matilda Freebody, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Wintershall в 1534 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1558 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Freeman nació en 1505, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lawrence Freeman, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anne Matilda Freebody, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mary Wintershall en 1534, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1558, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
